title: erigeron griseus
intro: Erigeron griseus, also known as Silvery Fleabane, is a perennial plant species in the daisy family (Asteraceae) native to western North America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Erigeron griseus include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and provide relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Erigeron griseus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used to harness its medicinal properties.
